name: Tater-Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Wash the mushrooms and carefully remove the stems. Set aside the tops.
3. Chop the stems.
4. Combine the chopped stems with the remaining ingredients, except the margarine.
5. Spoon the mixture onto the mushroom tops.
6. Grease the bottom of a jelly roll pan with margarine.
7. Arrange the mushrooms on the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 15 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Serves 30 stuffed caps. Approximately 15 calories each.
